---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of the problem this PR/issue addresses.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Include:
- What the feature should do
- How it fits into the existing architecture
- Which skill or pipeline phase it affects

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or reference materials.

## Checklist

- [ ] This feature aligns with the Forgewright pipeline philosophy
- [ ] I have considered backward compatibility
- [ ] I can provide examples of how this feature would be used
